name: Urn of Shadows
description: Contains the ashes of powerful demons.

abilities.name: Soul Release
abilities.description: When cast on an ally, consumes a charge to grant the target allied hero bonus health regeneration for a while. Number of Charges: ∞. Cooldown: 10. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 750. Health Regen Bonus: 30. Duration: 8. When cast on an enemy, consumes a charge to deal damage over time to the target for a while.
